text: Jess did you see what's happening downtown? They're closing the Morrison bridge again for repairs, whole week. How is anyone getting to the Hawthorne shift tomorrow without losing their mind 😤
Saw it. Already rerouted my whole commute. Also did you catch the governor just signed that short-term rental ban across half of Beaverton? People in the comments are FERAL.
Tabarnak. Half my catering clients book through those rentals for event weekends. That hits different when you're staring at the Thursday inbox right now.
Right?? Also the wildfire smoke advisory is back, AQI hit 158 this morning. Hawthorne mgmt is absolutely going to make us keep the lobby doors sealed again.
Already got the memo from front desk. Guests complain, we smile, tu sais comment c'est. Same movie different weekend.
Classic Hawthorne. Unrelated but did you see Portland FC actually won last night?? Was Papa Luc watching?
He was. Had him on the phone during the second half, he was yelling at the screen in full Québécois. Honestly first real laugh I've had all week.
That's the actual best news of the day ngl. Ok see you at shift — Sienna texted she's dropping off the good coffee for us 😂 don't be late
Jess just posted that pic from the Hawthorne grand opening last summer — you're literally in the background holding a canapé. Should I tag you or are you gonna pretend you didn't see it 😂
Jess just posted about her shift at The Hawthorne and I want to comment something but everything I type sounds like a guest services script 😂 help me out here
Nat did you see what Jess posted from the Hawthorne event last night 😭 she tagged me half-asleep behind the concierge desk, do I just laugh react or actually say something back
Pépère, Jess posted a video of me half-asleep in the Hawthorne break room 😭 do I just laugh along or pretend I never saw it
Jess posted that reel from the Hawthorne lobby incident and I'm literally tagged 😭 do I like it or pretend I never saw it lmao
jess did you see sienna commented 'free labor' on your post about the hawthorne breakfast rush 💀 she's not wrong tbh, tell her she owes us both a drink
Jess posted about her shift at Hawthorne and I had to clown on her in the comments 😂 told her the catering inbox was already dragging her name before 8am. she walked right into it.

Jess just posted that reel from the Hawthorne lobby setup last week and I look EXHAUSTED 😂 left a comment but she really should've warned me before tagging Beaverton's finest guest concierge in that lighting lol
Jess posted that reel of the catering setup from Thursday and I may have left a comment roasting her mise en place a little 😅 heads up in case she brings it up at the front desk today
Jess posted that reel from the Hawthorne lobby last night and I still haven't replied — been slammed on the catering inbox all morning. You saw it right? What do I even say lol
